text:
In a barren valley surrounded by mountains, an elderly owl hunched over an ancient map stumbled upon strange swirls.

"The ley line routes," he muttered. That's unusual here.

Nightfall. He peered closer.

Strange circles.

One night late. He drifted west. Stars blinked.

A small village. People whispered. He knew.

No owl there.

Late. Shadows shifted.

He wasn't welcome.

Quiet. He slept.

Every night. Creatures gathered.

Whispers.


A fox.

You speak.

Secrets.

They listen.

A story.

Of love.

He whispered.

I miss you.

The fox nodded.

One moonlit night.

They flew.

No tales remain.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
